description: Synthetic ASTM E1394 record set (H->P->O->R->R->R->R->R->L) for one ERBA EC90 chemistry/electrolyte panel. Exercises LIS-26: E1381 framing, E1394 parse, normalized raw-beside-LOINC/UCUM rows, and deterministic archive replay. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-26 / S2.4 - ERBA EC90 ASTM channel thread, re-scoped by LIS-74); EC90 LIS Interface V1.01 confirms RS232 or Ethernet with ASTM E1381/E1394
source.note: Application payload only (CR-separated E1394 records); the E1381 transport applies the STX FN text ETX C1 C2 CR LF envelope and validates the modulo-256 checksum at replay time. Replace with a real ERBA EC90 ASTM-HOST bench capture when available: set synthetic:false with capture provenance. DB9 pinout remains bench-pending per docs/testing/stage-1-3-machine-access-checklist.md.

db9.note: Bridge default line settings are captured as data; confirm EC90 operator RS232 settings and DB9 cable/pinout during bench capture.
